base_size.note: Full screen canvas, individual elements vary

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Bottom area of cage where poop accumulates, target of cleaning interaction
context.screen_position: Bottom section from y=110px to y=125px, full width x=0 to x=128 (128px wide, 15px tall)
adjacent_elements: poop (spawns randomly on this floor at y=110-125px)
context.usage_scenario: Interactive area where player swipes to clean poop. Poop objects (2x2px) appear randomly on this floor. When 3+ poop present, Echo enters dirty state. Swiping floor removes all poop and shows sparkle effect.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangular strip at bottom of screen. Represents cage floor/tray viewed from above.
visual_specification.texture: Optional subtle grid pattern: 2-3 horizontal lines (1px tall, #AB5236) at y=113, 118, 123 to suggest floor grating or texture. Otherwise flat color.

animation.description: Static background element. Poop objects appear on top of this floor.

visual_specification.details: Floor spans full width (128px) from y=110 to y=125 (15px tall). Base color #FFCCAA. Optional: 2-3 horizontal grid lines in #AB5236 spaced 5px apart. Poop objects (2x2px, #AB5236) spawn at random x positions within this area. Swipe gesture across this area triggers cleaning action.

relationships.differences_from: Unlike background: interactive (swipe to clean), darker color. Unlike perch: at bottom of screen, horizontal surface for poop. Unlike bowls: not a container, full width.

explicit_negations: No color changes when dirty (poop is separate objects)
